meta.description: Machine-readable design system inspired by The Little Campus (littlecampus.ca). Warm, premium, nurturing aesthetic with pastel palette and modern geometric typography.

border.card: transparent (cards rely on bg contrast, not borders)

fonts.heading: DM Sans (geometric sans-serif, Google Fonts alternative to Agrandir)
fonts.body: Lora (elegant serif, Google Fonts alternative to Tiempostext)

h1.classes: font-sans font-normal tracking-tight text-neutral-950 text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl
h1.note: Very large display size. font-normal because DM Sans geometric design naturally appears bold.

h2.classes: font-sans font-normal tracking-tight text-neutral-950 text-3xl sm:text-4xl

body.note: Lora serif for warmth and readability. Use italic for emphasis.

label.classes: section-label (pill badge: rounded-full bg-white px-4 py-1.5 text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-wider)
label.note: Section labels appear as subtle pill badges, not plain uppercase text.

shadows.note: Minimal shadows — flat design. Rely on background color contrast between sections and cards rather than borders or shadows.

borders.note: Cards generally have NO visible borders. They sit on colored section backgrounds (lavender-50, gradient) for contrast. Section dividers are removed in favor of background color transitions.

hero-image.description: Full-width hero with background image/video. Large display heading (h1, text-7xl) overlaid on left, subheading + CTA on right side. Generous padding (py-32+). Button is gold primary.

section-label.description: Small uppercase text inside a pill badge (section-label class: bg-white rounded-full px-4 py-1.5). Placed above section heading. Used to categorize sections.

card-feature.description: White bg, rounded-2xl, p-8, NO visible border. Small colored emoji icon at top. Sits on lavender/blue gradient background for contrast. Used for programs/pillars/features.

testimonial-card.description: White bg, rounded-2xl, p-8. Opens with large quotation mark icon. Quote text in serif italic. Attribution below with name and source (e.g., Google Reviews). No border.

cta-split.description: Two columns: one side is a rounded-2xl image, other side has heading (h2) + body text + gold primary button. Used for enrolment/action sections.

section-2col-narrative.description: Two columns: large heading (h2) on left taking up more width, body text (serif) on right. Used for founder/about sections. White or soft background.

section-alternating-bg.description: Sections alternate between white, lavender-50 (#F6F6FD), and gradient backgrounds (lavender-100 to sky-50). NO border-t separators — background color transitions provide visual separation.

pastel-badge.description: Small pill badge with pastel background color. Used for pillar/category labels. Each category gets its own pastel (green, yellow, pink, lavender, blue). rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-sans.
